mapping.a_element: complex elliptic curve C indexing T-equivariant elliptic cohomology
mapping.b_element: Calabi-Yau complete intersections / flag manifolds as GLSM targets

brief_justification: Paper A's machinery is equivariant stable homotopy theory: constructing a map of ring T-spectra (the rational equivariant sigma orientation) from MString_C to elliptic cohomology EC via characteristic classes. Paper B's machinery is 2d nonabelian gauge theory: analyzing GLSM Kahler phases, non-birational duality, and Quot/hyperquot moduli spaces. The only overlaps are the shared word 'sigma' (Weierstrass sigma genus vs. sigma model, unrelated meanings) and a generic algebraic-geometry backdrop; no governing process or role-for-role correspondence transfers between them.
